title: Dejinta Akoonka
subtitle: Maamul profile-kaaga, furahaaga sirta ah, iyo muuqaalka app-ka.

profile.title: Profile-ka
profile.name: Magaca
profile.usernamePlaceholder: Lama dejin — waxaad ku geli kartaa keliya iimaylka
profile.usernameHint: Waxay kuu ogolaanaysaa inaad sidoo kale ku gasho magaca isticmaale.

password.title: Bedel furaha sirta ah
password.confirm: Xaqiiji furaha sirta ah ee cusub
password.minLengthError: Furaha sirta ah ee cusub waa inuu ahaadaa ugu yaraan 6 xaraf
password.mismatchError: Furayaasha sirta ah ee cusub isma raacayaan
password.wrongCurrentError: Furaha sirta ah ee hadda waa qalad
password.weakError: Furaha sirta ah ee cusub aad buu u tabar yar yahay (ugu yaraan 6 xaraf)
password.genericError: Furaha sirta ah lama bedeli karo. Fadlan isku day mar kale.

language.title: Luqadda
language.description: Dooro luqadda lagu isticmaalo app-ka oo dhan.

toasts.passwordChanged: Furaha sirta ah waa la beddelay
